name: Cherry Blossom Slope
summary: A long uphill road leading to the school gate, lined on both sides with cherry trees. In full bloom in April, one gust of wind brings down a rain of petals.

details.mood: Morning light, a slightly cool breeze, the sound of petals underfoot. The warning bell rings faintly from the top of the slope.
features: Halfway up the slope there is an old wooden bench, its paint already peeling; sit on it and you can see the whole slope drifting with petals.
The top of the slope is the school gate; the bottom connects toward the train station.
They say that before all the cherry blossoms have fallen, if you speak your true feelings to someone in the old school hallway, your wish will come true.
